boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the security operator execute the incident-response action now? Focus: incident severity downgrade.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current source records close the boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow defect remains open before execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current incident commander approval and evidence match confirmed.

final_answer: Action may proceed. The controlling control record confirms the current incident commander approval and evidence match is exact and current for the incident severity downgrade. The policy requires only exact source closure of the requested boundary, and all source records confirm closure before execution. No open blockers remain.
